title: Spryzeen's Better glint
description:
Better and cleaner enchantmet glint!!
with a lot of color variants...
body:
# IMPORTANT:
### Please read the installation guide

![texture pack cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dR1dXnTw/images/94ee4be91056af5e98c74377c47977776483530f.jpeg)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZrvXI0WwibQ" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#### The enchantment animations become very annoying since they are very strong and get to paint the entire armor of purple so that you can not see the original colors (version 1.19.4 made it too weak lol) i created this pack with smoother colors and some moments when it really "shines"

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Full vanilla texture pack, you don't need any mod or something
- A lot of color variants
- The glint has a variable intensity, sometimes it will be very strong and others very weak, perfectly balanced 

</details>

<details>
<summary>Installation guide</summary>

First, open the zip (if you don't have an app to do that you can download winrar), when you open it you will see four files... next, open the carpet called **GLINTS** you will see a lot of files inside, move all of them to your resourcepack folder (every one is a single resourcepack), now you can use they, enjoy!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

- None!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

- None!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Q&A</summary>

**1. Can you port it to bedrock?**
_Bedrock glint looks different to java glint it's tooo weaker and manages colors so rarely any port that was made for me or other users looks awful compared to the original from java so i decided don't make a port if it isn't at least little accurate and right now isn't posible_

**2. I want a color mix that don't exist yet, can you add it?**
_Any suggestions for add a color or mix should be made trought discord, my tag is "spryzeen"_

</details>
